_job: Workspace manifest for Express API — deps + dev/build/start scripts only
_todo_after_this_file: Run from repo root: npm install
Add root .env with PORT, DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, JWT_SECRET, APP_URL
Do NOT create src/ files until tsconfig exists
_common_mistakes: Putting business logic or route handlers in package.json — this file is config only
Using nodemon instead of tsx watch for TypeScript ESM dev
Skipping workspace deps @crono/db, @crono/queue, @crono/shared — backend imports them later
_verify: npm install && npm run build -w backend (after tsconfig + src/index.ts exist)
name: backend
_dependencies_note: Phase 4 uses express, cors, dotenv, zod + workspace packages. Auth/billing deps listed now so you install once — wired in Phases 5+.
_devDependencies_note: tsx = run TypeScript in dev without nodemon. @types/* for Express 5, JWT, bcrypt.
